ko: 모든 부분을 해결하는 데 도움을 줄 거야. 너희의 파트너가 되고 싶어. 정말 좋아해.

en: All sharks are still in. Kevin and Daniel have both made the same offer of $500,000
ko: 소셜 미디어는 도와줄 수 없어. 내 팀을 이걸 위해 가동할게.

en: for a 20% stake of Joseph and Ann's instant noodle company, Felicious.
ko: 모든 상어들이 여전히 참여하고 있어.

en: So let me jump in and share with you guys. I think it was delicious.
ko: 케빈과 다니엘이 조셉과 앤의 즉석 국수 회사인 펠리셔스에 대해 50만 달러의 같은 제안을 했어.

en: What you've done is really remarkable.
ko: 케빈과 다니엘이 조셉과 앤의 즉석 국수 회사인 펠리셔스에 대해 50만 달러의 같은 제안을 했어.

en: I think they gave you a really good offer, and I'm glad you're doing so well.
ko: 내가 들어가서 말할게. 정말 맛있었어. 네가 한 일이 정말 대단해.

en: But I'm going to be out on this one.
ko: 내가 들어가서 말할게. 정말 맛있었어. 네가 한 일이 정말 대단해.

en: Thank you so much. Anna, Joseph, I've never had pho.
ko: 그들이 정말 좋은 제안을 했어. 잘 되고 있어서 기뻐. 하지만

en: So fun to say. It was incredible.
ko: 이번엔 나갈게. 고마워, 안나, 조셉. 난 쌀국수를 한 번도 안 먹어봤어.

en: Look, they've made you a better offer than I'm going to make. I'm out.
ko: 말하기도 재밌어. 정말 놀라웠어.

en: But congratulations. I'm glad you enjoyed the pho for your first experience.
ko: 말하기도 재밌어. 정말 놀라웠어.

en: Yeah, really good. Here's where I stand.
ko: 그들이 제안한 게 나보다 더 나아. 나갈게. 축하해. 첫 경험으로 쌀국수를 즐겼다니 기뻐.

en: I think the business is based on shelf space proximity, right?
ko: 그들이 제안한 게 나보다 더 나아. 나갈게. 축하해. 첫 경험으로 쌀국수를 즐겼다니 기뻐.

en: And that could be very fleeting. If the next one comes along,
particularly since you're in the lower cost stores or price competitive stores, you know, somebody comes along,
maybe it doesn't taste quite as good, but good enough. I think it's too limited for me.
So for those reasons, I'm out. Thank you so much.
You're doing something genius. I think you know a little bit about how I started a company from $10,000
to $6 or $7 billion in value.
You know what I've done.
I will help you run an efficient machine, grow like crazy.
And I'm very excited to take that journey with you. So what do you guys want to do?
ko: 뭐 하고 싶어?

en: So 20% is a little much for us to give.
ko: 우리한테 20은 좀 많아.

en: We understand what you guys bring to the table.
ko: 우리한테 20은 좀 많아.

en: We would love to work with either one of you, Sharcher.
ko: 너희가 가져오는 건 이해해. 둘 중 한 명이랑 일하고 싶어.

en: Both great. Daniel? Really? Either one? Okay.
Then 25% for me, if you would take these 20.
ko: 다니엘, 둘 다 괜찮아.

en: Would you do 12% for $500,000?
ko: 그럼 25로 할게. 20을 받아줄래?

en: I can't, guys. The amount of work that my team is going to be putting into this,
I mean, for me, the scarcest thing is the time.
I'll make it easy for you. I'll do the deal for 15%.
ko: 못하겠어. 우리 팀이 들어갈 일이 많아.

en: Listen, guys, if you wanted to hire somebody with my expertise of 30 years experience
ko: 내 시간은 정말 소중해. 15로 할게.

en: going from zero to everything that I built, it would cost a ton of money.
ko: 내 시간은 정말 소중해. 15로 할게.

en: I'm actually going to give you money to invest in that journey with you and be there every step of the way.
ko: 나는 너희와 함께 그 여정에 투자할 거야.

en: But I have to stay at 20% because I'm going to bring a team of 13 people
ko: 나는 너희와 함께 그 여정에 투자할 거야.

en: that are going to be there to help you every step of the way,
ko: 나는 너희와 함께 그 여정에 투자할 거야.

en: grow and scale and build the most extraordinary company you've ever built.
ko: 13명의 팀을 데리고 가서 도와줄 거야.

en: So it's 15 or 20.
ko: 15 아니면 20이야.

en: Okay. Kevin, you have a deal.
I'm glad you made that decision. I really am. Congrats.
ko: 케빈, 거래 성사됐어. 결정해줘서 기뻐.

en: I'm looking forward to working with you guys.
ko: 너희랑 일하는 게 기대돼.

en: Thank you.
ko: 고마워.
